rationale: Both reviews correctly identify and block on the exact same material correctness defects visible in the diff (vacuous `True` fields at ReductiveGroup:62/SemisimpleGroup:67 making the classes defeq to parents; IsUnipotent:48 type vs. docstring mismatch with AlgPoints:39 unused). Acting on either produces the identical improved PR outcome; Review 2's extra derivative nits (instance:78, theorem:80) add no new actionable defects.
